title: alopecurus alpinus subsp. stejnegeri
intro: Alopecurus alpinus subsp. stejnegeri, also known as Stejneger's Alopecurus or Japanese Brome, is a plant species belonging to the grass family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestion. Alopecurus alpinus subsp. stejnegeri is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
